title: cyrbasium jamesii
intro: Cyrbasium jamesii is a plant species commonly known as the 'mountain cyrbasium' or 'James' cyrbasium', belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae). Native to the mountainous regions of China, it has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Cyrbasium jamesii can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often prescribed by traditional Chinese medicine practitioners.
